name: Light Wall
summary: A transparent dynamic Cesium boundary wall with flowing texture, scan lines, and breathing highlights.
useCases: Security perimeter or restricted zone boundary
Campus, park, and industrial area visualization
Command-center warning fence and data boundary

positions.description: WGS84 boundary points. The SDK closes polygons automatically when possible.

color.description: CSS color used by the wall material.

scanLineCount.description: Number of vertical scan lines in the animated wall material.

minimal.code:
import { createLightWallEffect } from '@ztgk/geo-effect-kit'

const wall = createLightWallEffect(viewer, {
  positions: [
    { longitude: 116.337, latitude: 39.879 },
    { longitude: 116.448, latitude: 39.882 },
    { longitude: 116.468, latitude: 39.962 },
  ],
  type: 'security',
  color: '#27f5ff',
  height: 3600,
  speed: 1.1,
  opacity: 0.72,
})

wall.flyTo()
wall.destroy()

update.code:
wall.update({
  type: 'warning',
  color: '#ffbf3d',
  speed: 2,
  scanLineCount: 8,
  breathing: false,
})

notes: Pass an existing Cesium Viewer; the SDK does not create or own the viewer.
The effect uses Cesium WallGraphics plus GeoLightWallMaterial.
Changing positions or height rebuilds wall geometry; material parameters update live.
Call destroy() during page cleanup to remove the data source and render loop.
